headline: Proxy adviser Glass Lewis recommends Warner Bros shareholders vote for Paramount deal
summary: Independent proxy advisory firm Glass Lewis recommended Warner Bros Discovery shareholders to vote in favor of the ‌company's $110 billion deal to combine with Paramount Skydance.  The planned merger ‌would create an entertainment colossus with one of the industry's most storied content libraries, ​uniting franchises such as "Game of Thrones," "Mission: Impossible" and "Harry Potter."  Warner Bros shareholders are set to vote on the deal on April 23.

headline: Billionaires Snatch Up Netflix Stock Again After Warner Bros Deal Loss
summary: Three of the most closely watched hedge funds on Wall Street added aggressively to their Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) positions in Q4 2025 as the company’s proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (NASDAQ:WBD) collapsed. Ken Griffin’s Citadel Investors added 5.8 million shares, a 549% increase; Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies added 4.5 million shares, up 164%; and Philippe ... headline: 34-year-old product manager opened a restaurant after being laid off—it brings in up to $140,000 a month
summary: Through two layoffs, Zeeshan Bakhrani won a Food Network show and opened Pakistani-American street food joint Nishaan in New York.
